description_long: This is a standard traffic cone featuring a tall, conical shape with a wide, octagonal base for stability. The cone is predominantly orange with a broad, light gray reflective stripe encircling its upper section, enhancing visibility in low-light conditions. The base is black, thick, and appears to be made of a heavier material to prevent tipping, with a slightly textured surface for grip. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, matching the orange color of the lower cone. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the surface. The overall condition appears new, with no signs of wear, fading, or damage.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with a wide black base and a single gray reflective stripe, appearing new and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the cone, the reflective stripe, and the octagonal black base.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the reflective stripe and base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, showing the same features with slight shadow variation on the base.
description_view_3: Back view, visually similar to the front, with the reflective stripe and base fully visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide, light gray reflective stripe encircles the upper third of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, octagonal, black, thick, and appears weighted for stability, with a slightly textured surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos or markings are visible.
